issues.issue: Missing organization_id filter — data from ALL orgs would be exposed

improvement_hints_for_agent: Always implement the actual endpoint logic in the provided file; an empty file is a failure of completeness.
Multi-tenancy is non-negotiable in HRM systems; always include organization_id in your base query logic.
RBAC is a standard requirement; ensure every endpoint has a dependency or decorator for permission verification.
